summary.summary: Imported via zip fallback, file count: 1593

core_modules.description: Core molecular system builder and geometry/basis container; foundational entry for almost all molecular workflows.
Primary Hartree–Fock SCF engine and shared SCF interfaces used by many post-HF modules.
Unrestricted HF implementation for open-shell systems and a common branching point for correlated methods.
Restricted Kohn–Sham DFT implementation integrated with SCF stack and XC backends.
Unrestricted Kohn–Sham DFT for spin-polarized systems.
Second-order Møller–Plesset perturbation module; typical first post-SCF extension.
Coupled-cluster singles and doubles implementation; major post-HF production path.
Multiconfigurational CASCI driver for active-space workflows.
One-step CASSCF optimizer and key active-space optimization engine.
Periodic cell definition and lattice/basis setup for solid-state calculations.
k-point periodic HF SCF stack for crystalline systems.
Interoperability utilities for QCSchema import/export and external workflow integration.
